universe_definition: Active members aged 18-65 in NE or IA with diabetes, hypertension, or high cholesterol who are SMS opted-in and not suppressed
primary_slicing_axis: Open care gaps for preventive measures, prioritized by conversion rate weight
name: High-risk preventive care gap
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m JOIN marketing_ai.addresses a ON m.address_id = a.address_id JOIN marketing_ai.member_conditions mc ON m.member_id = mc.member_id WHERE LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '65 years' AND CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '18 years' AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.care_gaps cg WHERE cg.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(cg.status) = 'open' AND LOWER(cg.measure_category) = 'preventive') AND (LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e11%' OR LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'i10%' OR LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e78%')
rationale: Members with open preventive care gaps are most likely to convert to action. This bucket is optimized for conversion rate, with a focus on preventive measures relevant to diabetes, hypertension, and high cholesterol. The suggested treatment emphasizes timely preventive care to improve health outcomes.
suggested_treatment: Urgent reminders about upcoming preventive care appointments and their importance for managing chronic conditions.
coverage_note: The bucket set covers the entire universe of active members aged 18-65 in NE or IA with diabetes, hypertension, or high cholesterol who are SMS opted-in and not suppressed. No meaningful sub-population is intentionally excluded.

name: High-engagement replied
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m JOIN marketing_ai.addresses a ON m.address_id = a.address_id JOIN marketing_ai.member_conditions mc ON m.member_id = mc.member_id WHERE LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '65 years' AND CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '18 years' AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.sms_events se WHERE se.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(se.event_type) = 'replied' AND se.event_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days') AND (LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e11%' OR LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'i10%' OR LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e78%')
rationale: Members who have replied to previous SMS messages are highly engaged and responsive. This bucket is optimized for click rate, focusing on members who have shown interest in previous communications. The suggested treatment emphasizes personalized reminders and educational content based on their previous interactions.
suggested_treatment: Personalized reminders and educational content based on their previous interactions and preferences.
coverage_note: The bucket set covers the entire universe of active members aged 18-65 in NE or IA with diabetes, hypertension, or high cholesterol who are SMS opted-in and not suppressed. No meaningful sub-population is intentionally excluded.

sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m JOIN marketing_ai.addresses a ON m.address_id = a.address_id JOIN marketing_ai.member_conditions mc ON m.member_id = mc.member_id WHERE LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '65 years' AND CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '18 years' AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.sms_events se WHERE se.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(se.event_type) = 'delivered' AND se.event_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.sms_events se WHERE se.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(se.event_type) = 'replied' AND se.event_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days') AND (LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e11%' OR LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'i10%' OR LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e78%')

The suggested treatment emphasizes timely reminders and educational content to encourage consistent medication use.
